title: Arduino low-side MOSFET load switch
prompt: On my Arduino Uno (ATmega328) I want to switch a resistive load (a small heater strip) on the 5 V rail using a logic-level N-channel MOSFET as a low-side switch. The GPIO drives the gate, the load sits between 5 V and the drain, and the source goes to ground. Firmware turns the load on. Assume the gate is driven high for the bench test.
